QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: Other Investment Products_20

question.text: RBI Floating Rate Savings Bonds 2020 have a tenure of:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** RBI Floating Rate Savings Bonds 2020 have a 7-year tenure. The interest rate is reset every 6 months at NSC rate + 35 basis points. Senior citizens get early exit options. **The Trap:** 10 years is a common bond tenure but not for this specific product. The 7-year tenure with floating rate makes it unique among government-backed products. **Cross-Exam Context:** RBI bonds are covered in Series XVII and provide a floating rate alternative to fixed deposits for retirees. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Senior citizens can exit early: 80+ after 4 years, 70-80 after 5 years, 60-70 after 6 years. Factor this flexibility when recommending to elderly clients.
